01 = Able to do only light laundry, such as minor hand wash or light washer loads. Due to physical, cognitive, or mental limitations, needs assistance with heavy laundry such as carrying large loads of laundry.
02 = Unable to do any laundry due to physical limitation or needs continual supervision and assistance due to cognitive or mental limitation.
